attacks.textEn: This attack does 50 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.)
During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

textEn: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.textEn: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to it by attacks.

attacks.textEn: This attack does 60 more damage for each Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon.
Heal 100 damage from each of your Benched Pokémon.

textEn: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

nameJa: エリアゼロアンダーパーク
textEn:
Each player who has any Tera Pokémon in play can have up to 8 Pokémon on their Bench.

If a player no longer has any Tera Pokémon in play, that player discards Pokémon from their Bench until they have 5. When this card leaves play, both players discard Pokémon from their Bench until they have 5.
Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon that has 30 HP or less remaining.

You can use this card only if your opponent has exactly 2 Prize cards remaining.

During your opponent's next turn, if their Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack used by your Tera Pokémon, take 1 more Prize card.

nameJa: ブリリアントブレンダー
textEn: Search your deck for up to 5 cards and discard them. Then, shuffle your deck.
Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon or 1 Evolution Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon with 70 HP or less and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 2 in any combination of [G] Pokémon and Basic [G] Energy cards you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn.

Discard your hand and draw 5 cards.
Search your deck for a Stadium card and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
If you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent, attacks used by the Pokémon this card is attached to cost [C] less.
Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards of different types, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Attach 1 of them to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
Discard a Special Energy from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

nameJa: ガラスのトランペット
textEn:
You can use this card only if you have any Tera Pokémon in play.

Choose up to 2 of your Benched [W] Pokémon and attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to each of them.
Each Stage 2 Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) gets −30 HP.
Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Hop's Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

nameJa: ホップのこだわりハチマキ
textEn: Attacks used by the Hop's Pokémon this card is attached to cost [C] less and do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.
Pokémon Tools attached to each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) have no effects.
Once during each player's turn, that player may put up to 2 Basic [L] Energy cards from their discard pile into their hand.
If the Lillie's Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, that player takes 1 fewer Prize card.
Put up to 5 in any combination of Pokémon and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.
Put a Pokémon or a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand.
N's Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Retreat Cost.
Attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched N's Pokémon.
Attacks used by Hop's Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) do 30 more damage to the opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
At the end of your turn (after your attack), if the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot, you may attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to it.

nameJa: プライムキャッチャー
textEn: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot. If you do, switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

nameJa: スクランブルスイッチ
textEn: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, you may move any amount of Energy from the Pokémon you moved to your Bench to the new Active Pokémon.
When the Tera Pokémon this card is attached to uses an attack, that attack costs 1 Energy less. (The Energy can be of any type.)
Search your deck for a Tera Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
